category_sources: source_facts.description says source code documentation tool; official GitHub README describes ROBODoc as a program documentation tool that extracts headers from source code.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses ROBODoc; source_facts.name is robodoc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says usage information is in Docs/manual.html; README is also an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository is linked from the project metadata and contains Source, Docs, and README for ROBODoc.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe source-code documentation extraction, multiple output formats, C implementation, and CLI executables.
